nasb.text: “You stand today, all of you, before the Lord your God: your chiefs, your tribes, your elders and your officers, even all the men of Israel,

esv.text: “You are standing today, all of you, before the Lord your God: the heads of your tribes, your elders, and your officers, all the men of Israel,

cnv.text: “今日你們全都站在耶和華你們的　神面前；你們的首領、族長、長老、官長和以色列所有的男子，

ccb.text: “今天，你们全都站在你们的上帝耶和华面前，包括你们的族长、长老、官员、所有以色列男子、
